team.name: Nikolas Aasheim
team.title: Cand. Psych. — OptoCeutics ApS & Frederiksberg Hospital
team.affiliation: Copenhagen Affective Disorder Research Centre, Frederiksberg Hospital & OptoCeutics ApS
team.bio: Cand. Psych. and Marie Skłodowska-Curie Fellow, primus motor for FELIX. Early-stage researcher within the Astrotech consortium, investigating the clinical efficacy of 40 Hz gamma neurostimulation for major depressive disorder.

team.name: Klaus Martiny
team.title: MD, DMSc, PhD — Clinical Professor, University of Copenhagen
team.affiliation: New Interventions in Depression Group (NID-Group), Copenhagen Affective Disorder Research Centre, Bispebjerg and Frederiksberg Hospital
team.bio: Clinical professor and specialist in psychiatry. Heads an intensive affective disorders unit at Mental Health Center Copenhagen and leads the NID-Group. His research focuses on chronotherapeutic augmentation strategies for depression, including bright light therapy, dynamic LED lighting, wake therapy, and sleep time stabilisation.

team.name: Marcus Carstensen
team.title: PhD Electrical Engineering (Photonics) — Co-founder & CSO, OptoCeutics
team.affiliation: OptoCeutics ApS & Technical University of Denmark
team.bio: Co-founder and Chief Scientific Officer of OptoCeutics. Principal Investigator of the Horizon 2020 Astrotech project. His PhD research at DTU on photonics and high-speed holographic laser printing earned the European Innovation Radar Prize for Excellent Science in 2018. Leads development of the invisible spectral flicker technology used in FELIX.

team.name: Paul Michael Petersen
team.title: Professor — Technical University of Denmark
team.affiliation: Department of Electrical and Photonics Engineering, DTU
team.bio: Expert in photonics engineering and light technology. Co-conceived the FELIX study approach combining light technology with psychiatric treatment.

team.name: Kamilla Woznica Miskowiak
team.title: Professor — Copenhagen University Hospital
team.affiliation: Neurocognition and Emotion in Affective Disorders (NEAD) Group, CADIC
team.bio: Designed the neurocognitive test battery for the study. Specialist in cognition and emotion in affective disorders.

study.name: FELIX
study.fullName: 40 Hz Light Neurostimulation Therapy for Depression
